modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Chrome keeps crashing when I try to visit any website.

full_description_text: So, like, every time I open a website on Chrome, it just crashes. I don’t know why it keeps doing this, but it happens all the time. It’s super annoying because I can’t really do anything online. I just want to browse without it crashing all the time!
short_description: Chrome keeps crashing when I try to visit any website.
description: So, like, every time I open a website on Chrome, it just crashes. I don’t know why it keeps doing this, but it happens all the time. It’s super annoying because I can’t really do anything online. I just want to browse without it crashing all the time!
